title: canna ottonis
intro: Canna ottonis, also known as the Queensland or Otto's canna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cannaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canna ottonis include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and creams, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested for internal use.
